item.title: My Featured Post
item.description:
Anim eiusmod irure incididunt sint cupidatat. Incididunt irure irure irure nisi ipsum do ut quis fugiat consectetur proident cupidatat incididunt cillum. item.title: Hello World
item.description:
This is my first blog post. Here’s how to use the Spotify shortcode:

{{< spotify id=“track_id_here” >}}

And here’s how to use the featured image shortcode:

{{< featured-image src="/images/hello-world.jpg" alt=“Hello World” caption=“My first blog post” >}}
